featuresPage.title: Key Features
featuresPage.subtitle: We analyze your site thoroughly through 5 audit lenses

lenses.title: Security Audit
lenses.description: Checks for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, secret leaks, authentication patterns, webhook security, and more.

lenses.title: Performance Optimization
lenses.description: Core Web Vitals analysis, Japan CDN optimization, mobile performance, and asset optimization.

lenses.title: LINE API Audit
lenses.description: Webhook signature verification, token management, LIFF configuration, and rate limit handling.

lenses.title: i18n / UX Check
lenses.description: Character encoding, date/currency formats, multilingual support, and Japanese UX patterns.

lenses.title: Maintainability
lenses.description: Outdated dependencies, code structure analysis, deployment risks, and technical debt assessment.

prExample.title: Auto-fix PR Example
prExample.description: Issues that can be safely fixed are automatically created as reviewed pull requests.

shopify.title: Shopify
shopify.description: Checks Liquid template security, storefront API tokens, app permission scopes, and checkout scripts.

wordpress.title: WordPress
wordpress.description: Checks plugin vulnerabilities, wp-admin access control, REST API auth, file permissions, and wp-config.php protection.

nextjs.title: Next.js
nextjs.description: Checks NEXT_PUBLIC_* env vars, Server Actions auth, API route middleware, and client-side secret leakage.

line.title: LINE Mini App
line.description: Checks X-Line-Signature verification, channel access token management, LIFF URL config, and rate limit handling.

faq.a: For first-time clients, we run a basic security and performance check on one repository for free. The report is delivered via email.
Monthly plans can be canceled anytime. Annual plans require a 1-year commitment but include a 15% discount.

faq.q: Are there limitations on which sites I can audit?
faq.a: We support major platforms including Shopify, WordPress, Next.js, and LINE Mini Apps. GitHub repository access is required.
Reports are delivered as Japanese PDF documents. They include prioritized issue lists, business impact explanations, and specific remediation steps.
For issues that can be safely auto-fixed, we create GitHub pull requests automatically. Just review and merge to apply the fix.
Included in Growth and Pro plans, onboarding covers initial setup support: repository connection, first audit run, and report walkthrough.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.subtitle: WebMori is a Tokyo-based web security audit service

sections.title: Mission
sections.description: To make enterprise-level web security accessible to Tokyo freelancers and SMBs. We remove technical complexity so you can focus on your business.

sections.title: Approach
sections.description: Not just vulnerability scanning — we evaluate sites holistically from 5 angles: security, performance, LINE API, i18n, and maintainability. Reports include specific fix proposals with business impact explanations.

sections.title: Technology
sections.description: Our AI-powered audit engine analyzes codebases with the quality of a human security expert, but faster. Auto-fix PRs let you resolve safe issues instantly.
